title: Sea level rise | 海平面上升
description: Raise the sea level to 110, most of the land will be submerged by water,offering a unique gameplay experience.
body:
# **Sea level rise 🌊**


This mod/datapack raises the sea level to 110, most of the land will be submerged by water,offering a unique gameplay experience.

Upon your first entry into the world, you will receive a boat to begin your survival journey

### ⚠️ **Warning**：

If you plan to use this mod or datapack, we strongly recommend creating a new world. Using it in an existing world may cause unexpected issues—such as chunk generation errors, missing structures, or world corruption.
If you must use it in an existing world, back up your save file first. Failure to do so could result in irreversible damage to your world.
